title: Connected textures for Mosaic Glass Mod (requires Optifine)
description: This resource pack allows the use of connected textures for Mosaic Glass mod
body:
### REQUIRES  [Mosaic Glass mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/mosaic_glass) AND [OPTIFINE](https://www.optifine.net/home)

This resource pack allows the use of connected textures for [Mosaic Glass Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/mosaic_glass) **requires Optifne**

*Original textures and resource pack by elwood612_. Based on [Better Stained Glass RP](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-stained-glass) Used with permission*
